LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF EMA BELL'S UNOPPOSED MOTION TO APPROVE PROPOSITION 65 SETTLEMENT AND CONSENT JUDGMENT IS GRANTED. GOOD CAUSE APPEARING, PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO APPROVE SETTLEMENT PURSUANT TO HEALTH AND SAFETY CODE SECTION 25249.7(F) AND CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE SECTION 664.6 IS GRANTED AND JUDGMENT SHALL BE ENTERED CONSISTENT WITH THE PROPOSITION 65 SETTLEMENT AND THE PARTIES' [PROPOSED] CONSENT JUDGMENT. PROPOSED ORDER AND JUDGMENT SUBMITTED. JUDGE: JOSEPH M. QUINN; CLERK: W. TRUPEK; NOT REPORTED (302/JMQ)

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-02-2025 Off Calendar

Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment
Off Calendar May-20-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF EMA BELL'S Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment

Plaintiff Ema Bell's unopposed Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment is GRANTED.

Good cause appearing, Plaintiff's motion to approve settlement pursuant to Health and Safety Code section 25249.7(f) and Code of Civil Procedure section 664.6 is granted and judgment shall be entered consistent with the Proposition 65 Settlement and the parties' [Proposed] Consent Judgment.

Proposed order and judgment submitted.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/JMQ)
